name: Allied Loan
description_short: Allied Loan offers same-day and installment loans in San Antonio and Universal City, TX, serving borrowers with no credit or bad credit through quick online or in-person applications.
description_long:
Allied Loan is a Texas-based direct lender operating in the San Antonio area with two physical locations (San Antonio and Universal City). The company positions itself as a customer-focused alternative to traditional banks for consumers facing urgent cash needs. Founded with a focus on serving borrowers regardless of credit history, Allied Loan has built a reputation through personalized service and long-term customer relationships—one customer review mentions using the company for over ten years.

Allied Loan offers three primary loan products: Same Day Loans for immediate cash needs with flexible repayment, Installment Loans for borrowers who need extended repayment terms, and Title Loans for those with poor credit who own vehicles. The company emphasizes fast approvals, transparent terms with no hidden fees, and accessibility through multiple application channels: online, phone, or in-person visits. They explicitly market to borrowers with no credit or bad credit, positioning themselves as an inclusive alternative to traditional lenders.

What distinguishes Allied Loan is its emphasis on customer service and relationship-building. Website reviews highlight staff members by name (Chrissy, Makayle) and mention the owner's personal involvement with customers, creating a community-focused lending experience. The company advertises free financial advice and maintains an educational blog covering topics like bad credit loans. They also publicly display licensing information and fee schedules, suggesting regulatory compliance and transparency.

As an emergency-cash lender, Allied Loan serves the subprime market with small, quick-turnaround loans typical of this category. Borrowers should understand that while the company appears legitimate and licensed, small emergency loans generally carry higher APRs and fees than traditional personal loans. The lack of specific APR, fee, or loan amount ranges on the website means borrowers must contact the company directly to understand true borrowing costs. This is a viable option for genuine emergencies but not suitable for debt consolidation or long-term financing needs.
address: 5525 Blanco Rd Suite 108, San Antonio, TX 78216

company_info.headquarters: 5525 Blanco Rd Suite 108, San Antonio, TX 78216

pros: Same-day loan approvals available for urgent financial needs
Multiple application methods: online, phone, or in-person at two locations
Explicitly serves borrowers with no credit or bad credit history
Title loans available for vehicle owners with poor credit
Staff trained in customer service with named employee reviews praising courteous interactions
Long-term customer retention—one review mentions 10+ years of service
Publicly displays fee schedule and regulatory licensing information for transparency
cons: Website does not disclose specific APR rates, making true cost comparison impossible before contact
No loan amount ranges listed—maximum and minimum borrowing limits unclear
Limited geographic service area (San Antonio/Universal City only) despite serving 'greater San Antonio area'
No mention of alternative products like payday alternative loans or credit-building options for customers wanting to improve credit
Blog content appears generic with vague dates (articles listed as April 2026, March 2026, indicating website maintenance issues)
best_for: Consumers facing immediate cash emergencies who cannot access traditional bank loans
Borrowers with bad credit or no credit history who need fast access to funds
Vehicle owners with poor credit seeking title-based loans
Repeat customers seeking relationship-based lending with personalized service
diagnosis: Allied Loan is best for San Antonio-area residents facing genuine emergencies who cannot qualify for traditional bank loans and need cash within 24 hours. However, borrowers should contact the company directly for APR and fee details before applying, as these are not disclosed online, and should exhaust payday alternative loans (under 36% APR) through credit unions first if eligible.
services: Same-day loans with flexible repayment terms
Installment loans with extended repayment periods
Title loans using vehicle as collateral
In-person consultations at San Antonio location
In-person consultations at Universal City location
Educational blog content on credit and lending topics
FAQ resources for installment, same-day, and title loans
Transparent fee schedules and regulatory disclosures
meta_description: Same-day and installment loans in San Antonio and Universal City, TX, serving borrowers with no credit or bad credit.
